name: Basic Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Sift the first three ingredients into a large bowl.
3. Add butter and mix well with the sifted ingredients.
4. Stir in the coarsely chopped walnuts.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto baking sheets.
6. Bake until the cookies are lightly golden, about 20-25 minutes.
WARNING: Real butter is the secret to these buttery tasting cookies. Makes 30 cookies.
